articles.headline: OpenAI snags $110 billion in investments from Amazon, Nvidia, and Softbank
articles.description: OpenAI has closed another round of funding, totalling $110 billion being newly committed to the maker of ChatGPT, which it says has more than 900 million weekly active users and over 50 million consumer subscribers. Amazon is investing $50 billion and striking a deal that includes plans for custom models and more. Nvidia and SoftBank […]

articles.headline: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
articles.description: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users — and according to company insiders, the team built the entire feature in approximately a week and a half, largely using Claude Code itself.The launch marks a major inflection point in the race to deliver practical AI agents to mainstream users, positioning Anthropic to compete not just with OpenAI and Google in conversational AI, but with Microsoft's Copilot in the burgeoning market for AI-powered productivity tools."Cowork lets you complete non-technical tasks much like how developers use...

articles.headline: Who’s really running AI? Inside the billion-dollar battle over regulation with Alex Bores
articles.description: The Pentagon is playing chicken with Anthropic over who gets to control how the military uses AI while communities across the country are blocking data center construction. As the AI debate has been flattened to “doomers versus boomers,” one state legislator is attempting to walk a middle road. On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecca Bellan sits down with Alex Bores, a New York State Assemblymember and candidate for U.S. Congress. Bores sponsored New York’s […]

software_engineering.headline: OpenAI Secures $110 Billion from Amazon, Nvidia, Softbank for AI Development
software_engineering.what_changed: OpenAI received $110 billion in new investments from Amazon, Nvidia, and Softbank, with Amazon investing $50 billion and planning custom model collaborations.
software_engineering.why_care: This massive investment signals increased competition and innovation in AI, potentially leading to new tools and platforms you will integrate or build upon.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Investigate how Amazon's custom model plans with OpenAI might impact your cloud architecture and development strategies.

software_engineering.headline: Anthropic Launches Cowork, a No-Code Desktop AI Agent for Claude
software_engineering.what_changed: Anthropic released Cowork, a new AI agent for Claude that allows non-technical users to perform tasks directly within their files without coding.
software_engineering.why_care: This tool could streamline collaboration with non-technical team members, reducing manual tasks and freeing up your time for complex development work.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Explore how Cowork's no-code capabilities might integrate into your team's workflow to automate or simplify non-technical project aspects.

software_engineering.headline: AI Regulation Battle Heats Up: Pentagon vs. Anthropic, Local Data Center Blocks
software_engineering.what_changed: The Pentagon and Anthropic are clashing over military AI control, while communities are blocking data center construction, highlighting growing regulatory and societal friction.
software_engineering.why_care: Evolving AI regulations and infrastructure challenges could impact your project deployments, data handling, and the availability of computing resources.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Stay informed on proposed AI legislation and local data center developments that could affect your current and future cloud infrastructure planning.
